entries.title: Pomodoro Technique
entries.content: Study 25 minutes, break 5 minutes. After 4 cycles, take a longer 15–30 min break. Improves focus and reduces burnout.

entries.title: Active Recall
entries.content: Test yourself instead of re-reading. Close notes and explain concepts aloud or use flashcards. Strengthens long-term memory.

entries.title: Spaced Repetition
entries.content: Review material at increasing intervals (1 day, 3 days, 1 week). Fights forgetting curve. Tools: Anki, Atlas quiz mode.

entries.title: Feynman Technique
entries.content: Learn by teaching: explain the topic in simple words as if to a beginner. Gaps in your explanation reveal what to study next.

entries.title: Exam Preparation Checklist
entries.content: 1) Gather syllabus topics 2) Practice past papers 3) Focus weak areas 4) Sleep well before exam 5) Verify formulas and units.
